mainEntity.name: Can I see my own doctor for my back injury or do I have to see the company doctor?

acceptedAnswer.text: Initially, your employer or their insurer usually chooses the doctor. However, in Utah and Idaho, you typically have a one-time right to change your treating physician. You must follow specific procedures to do so.
